_comment: Example per-page overrides. Filename pattern: {slug}.overrides.json (e.g. about.overrides.json). At runtime, page-overrides.js fetches /assets/data/pages/{slug}.overrides.json and applies each key to the matching [data-editable="{key}"] element on the page. Text overrides set textContent; image overrides set src and alt. A 404 here is fine — the page just renders its baked-in content. Admin UI writes this file via the Functions PR flow.

hero-subhead.value: Evidence-based ABA therapy for children ages 2–18, delivered in the settings that work best.

intro-paragraph.value: On Target ABA blends compassionate care, individualized programming, and family partnership to help kids make real progress, every week.

section-1-headline.value: A goal as clear as it gets.
